commentary:
**Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 08 Jul**

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with exceptional depth (ILLIQ: 0.0014) and competitive spreads, establishing it as the gold standard. LSE trails significantly with ILLIQ of 0.1578, indicating substantially lower depth, though its AR spread (0.8476%) remains reasonable. Notably, Nasdaq 100 exhibits the tightest Roll spread (1.7238%) despite solid ILLIQ metrics, suggesting concentrated trading activity. European bourses collectively underperform transatlantic counterparts across all dimensions.
